title: EWS1 Professional Indemnity Insurance Scheme: Departmental Minute from MHCLG
body: "This Minute provides an update to a contingent liability, arising from the EWS1 Professional Indemnity Insurance Scheme, which is now closed. The Scheme was introduced in a previous Departmental Minute, when the final liability was not known. This Minute provides details of the final liability and explains the circumstances. "
